data.content: The project uses **MSTest**. Tests are categorized with `[TestCategory]`. I'll run only the Integration tests using the category filter.

toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-fcfb6606e9ed44349a934258b51751cd && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -30", "description": "Run MSTest integration tests", "initial_wait": 60}

data.content:
✅ **Tests passed.** The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0). I ran the integration tests with:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

The `GetAll_QueriesDatabase` integration test passed successfully.
